svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="Gl0DaDBeaGKsYlhG3Qsi" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-1319" dy="-139" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="3300" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="hw_lane" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;horizontal=1;" value="Hardware Capture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="380" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hw_band" parent="hw_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Spiro Band
(Wearable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hw_mic" parent="hw_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Microphone
(Always-On)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="30" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hw_stream" parent="hw_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Audio Stream" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="220" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="hw_lane" source="hw_band" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="hw_mic"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="hw_lane" source="hw_mic" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="hw_stream"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proc_lane" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;horizontal=1;" value="AI Processing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="560" x="460" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proc_gemini" parent="proc_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Gemini 3 Pro

(832 Events)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="210" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proc_speaker" parent="proc_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Speaker Mapping
(GPT-4o-mini)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="400" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proc_gcf" parent="proc_lane" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="GCF Conversion
